title:
Coach Jay - Performance Architect for Athletes on Instagram: "Parents don’t realize this…

What you say before a game can either add pressure
or completely free your child.

Most athletes aren’t struggling with skill
they’re struggling with expectation

The right words remove fear
the wrong ones add weight

If you want them to play freely
it starts with how you speak to them before it begins

Save this before their next game
Share it with a parent who needs this

#sportsparenting #youthsports #athletemindset #mentalperformance #parentingtips #sportspsychology #confidence #growthmindset #performancemental #sportscoaching #athlete  #athletes #athlètes #athletelife"
